tEn: DAPO: An Open-Source LLM Reinforcement Learning System at Scale
tZh: DAPO：一个开源的大规模LLM强化学习系统
sEn: DAPO is an open-source large-scale RL system achieving 50 points on AIME 2024 with Qwen2.5-32B, featuring decoupled clip and dynamic sampling.
sZh: DAPO是一个开源的大规模强化学习系统，使用Qwen2.5-32B基座模型在AIME 2024上达到50分，其核心是解耦裁剪和动态采样策略。
absEn: Inference scaling empowers LLMs with unprecedented reasoning ability, with reinforcement learning as the core technique to elicit complex reasoning. However, key technical details of state-of-the-art reasoning LLMs are concealed (such as in OpenAI o1 blog and DeepSeek R1 technical report), thus the community still struggles to reproduce their RL training results. We propose the $\textbf{D}$ecoupled Clip and $\textbf{D}$ynamic s$\textbf{A}$mpling $\textbf{P}$olicy $\textbf{O}$ptimization ($\textbf{DAPO}$) algorithm, and fully open-source a state-of-the-art large-scale RL system that achieves 50 points on AIME 2024 using Qwen2.5-32B base model. Unlike previous works that withhold training details, we introduce four key techniques of our algorithm that make large-scale LLM RL a success. In addition, we open-source our training code, which is built on the verl framework, along with a carefully curated and processed dataset. These components of our open-source system enhance reproducibility and support future research in large-scale LLM RL.
absZh: 推理扩展通过强化学习赋予大语言模型前所未有的推理能力，但最先进的推理模型的关键技术细节（如OpenAI o1博客和DeepSeek R1技术报告）被隐藏，导致社区难以复现其RL训练结果。我们提出了解耦裁剪与动态采样策略优化（DAPO）算法，并完全开源了一个最先进的大规模RL系统，该系统使用Qwen2.5-32B基座模型在AIME 2024上达到50分。与以往隐藏训练细节的工作不同，我们介绍了使大规模LLM RL成功的四项关键技术。此外，我们开源了基于verl框架的训练代码，以及精心整理和处理的数据集。这些开源组件增强了可复现性，并支持未来大规模LLM RL的研究。

contrib.en: Proposes DAPO algorithm with four key techniques for large-scale LLM RL.
contrib.zh: 提出DAPO算法，包含四项关键技术，用于大规模LLM强化学习。

contrib.en: Achieves 50 points on AIME 2024 using Qwen2.5-32B, surpassing DeepSeek-R1-Zero-Qwen-32B.
Open-sources training code, dataset, and algorithm details for reproducibility.
contrib.zh: 开源训练代码、数据集和算法细节，提升可复现性。

contrib.en: Introduces Clip-Higher to prevent entropy collapse and promote exploration.
contrib.zh: 引入Clip-Higher策略，防止熵崩溃并促进探索。

contrib.en: Proposes Dynamic Sampling to filter zero-gradient prompts and improve efficiency.
contrib.zh: 提出动态采样，过滤零梯度提示，提高训练效率。

contrib.en: Implements Token-Level Policy Gradient Loss and Overlong Reward Shaping for stability.
contrib.zh: 实现词元级策略梯度损失和过长奖励塑造，提升训练稳定性。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to mathematical tasks; generalization to other domains not verified.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于数学任务，未验证对其他领域的泛化能力。

limits.en: Requires significant computational resources for large-scale RL training.
limits.zh: 大规模强化学习训练需要大量算力资源。

limits.en: Overlong reward shaping may still introduce bias for truncated responses.
limits.zh: 过长奖励塑造仍可能对截断响应引入偏差。

limits.en: Dynamic Sampling increases sampling instances, potentially affecting throughput.
limits.zh: 动态采样增加采样实例，可能影响吞吐量。

limits.en: Training reward correlates weakly with validation accuracy, indicating overfitting.
limits.zh: 训练奖励与验证准确率相关性弱，表明存在过拟合。

items.en: 1]ByteDance Seed 2Institute for AI Industry Research (AIR), Tsinghua University 3]The University of Hong Kong 4]SIA-Lab of Tsinghua AIR and ByteDance Seed \contributionFull author list in Contributions
items.zh: 1]字节跳动Seed 2]清华大学智能产业研究院（AIR） 3]香港大学 4]清华大学AIR与字节跳动Seed联合SIA-Lab \contribution完整作者列表见贡献部分

items.en: Inference scaling empowers LLMs with unprecedented reasoning ability, with reinforcement learning as the core technique to elicit complex reasoning. However, key technical details of state-of-the-art reasoning LLMs are concealed (such as in OpenAI o1 blog and DeepSeek R1 technical report), thus the community still struggles to reproduce their RL training results. We propose the Decoupled Clip and Dynamic sAmpling Policy Optimization (DAPO) algorithm, and fully open-source a state-of-the-art large-scale RL system that achieves 50 points on AIME 2024 using Qwen2.5-32B base model. Unlike previous works that withhold training details, we introduce four key techniques of our algorithm that make large-scale LLM RL a success. In addition, we open-source our training code, which is built on the verl framework 111https://github.com/volcengine/verl, along with a carefully curated and processed dataset. These components of our open-source system enhance reproducibility and support future research in large-scale LLM RL.
items.zh: 推理扩展赋予大语言模型前所未有的推理能力，其中强化学习是激发复杂推理的核心技术。然而，最先进的推理大语言模型的关键技术细节被隐藏（如OpenAI o1博客和DeepSeek R1技术报告），因此社区仍难以复现其强化学习训练结果。我们提出了解耦裁剪与动态采样策略优化（DAPO）算法，并完全开源了一个最先进的大规模强化学习系统，该系统基于Qwen2.5-32B基础模型在AIME 2024上达到50分。与以往隐瞒训练细节的工作不同，我们介绍了算法的四个关键技术，这些技术使大规模大语言模型强化学习取得成功。此外，我们开源了基于verl框架111https://github.com/volcengine/verl构建的训练代码，以及精心整理和处理的数据集。我们开源系统的这些组件增强了可复现性，并支持未来在大规模大语言模型强化学习方面的研究。

items.en: Qiying Yu at \checkdata[Project Page]https://dapo-sia.github.io/
items.zh: Qiying Yu at \checkdata[项目页面]https://dapo-sia.github.io/

items.capEn: Figure 1: AIME 2024 scores of DAPO on the Qwen2.5-32B base model, outperforming the previous SoTA DeepSeek-R1-Zero-Qwen-32B using 50% training steps.
items.capZh: 图1：DAPO在Qwen2.5-32B基础模型上的AIME 2024得分，使用50%的训练步数超越了之前的最优结果DeepSeek-R1-Zero-Qwen-32B。

items.en: Test-time scaling such as OpenAI’s o1 [1] and DeepSeek’s R1 [2] brings a profound paradigm shift to Large Language Models (LLMs) [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]. Test-time scaling enables longer Chain-of-Thought thinking and induces sophisticated reasoning behaviors, which makes the models superior in competitive math and coding tasks like AIME and Codeforces.
items.zh: 测试时扩展，如OpenAI的o1 [1]和DeepSeek的R1 [2]，为大语言模型带来了深刻的范式转变 [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]。测试时扩展使得更长的思维链思考成为可能，并引发复杂的推理行为，使模型在AIME和Codeforces等竞争性数学和编程任务中表现优异。

items.en: The central technique driving the revolution is large-scale Reinforcement Learning (RL), which elicits complex reasoning behaviors such as self-verification and iterative refinement. However, the actual algorithm and key recipe for scalable RL training remains a myth, hidden from technical reports of existing reasoning models [1, 2, 8, 9, 10, 11]. In this paper, we reveal significant obstacles in large-scale RL training and open-source a scalable RL system with fully open-sourced algorithm, training code and dataset that provides democratized solutions with industry-level RL results.
items.zh: 推动这一革命的核心技术是大规模强化学习，它激发了自我验证和迭代改进等复杂推理行为。然而，可扩展强化学习训练的实际算法和关键配方仍然是一个谜，隐藏在现有推理模型的技术报告之外 [1, 2, 8, 9, 10, 11]。在本文中，我们揭示了大规强化学习训练中的重大障碍，并开源了一个可扩展的强化学习系统，包括完全开源的算法、训练代码和数据集，提供了具有行业级强化学习结果的民主化解决方案。

items.en: We experiment over Qwen2.5-32B [12] as the pretrained model for RL. In our initial GRPO run, we achieved only 30 points on AIME — a performance significantly below DeepSeek’s RL (47 points). A thorough analysis reveals that the naive GRPO baseline suffers from several key issues such as entropy collapse, reward noise, and training instability. The broader community has encountered similar challenges in reproducing DeepSeek’s results [13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19] suggesting that critical training details may have been omitted in the R1 paper that are required to develop an industry-level, large-scale, and reproducible RL system.
items.zh: 我们使用Qwen2.5-32B [12]作为强化学习的预训练模型进行实验。在初始的GRPO运行中，我们在AIME上仅获得30分——远低于DeepSeek的强化学习结果（47分）。深入分析表明，朴素的GRPO基线存在几个关键问题，如熵崩溃、奖励噪声和训练不稳定。更广泛的社区在复现DeepSeek的结果时也遇到了类似挑战 [13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19]，这表明R1论文中可能遗漏了开发行业级、大规模、可复现强化学习系统所需的关键训练细节。

items.en: To close this gap, we release an open-source state-of-the-art system for large-scale LLM RL, which achieves 50 points on AIME 2024 based on Qwen2.5-32B model, outperforming previous state-of-the-art results achieved by DeepSeek-R1-Zero-Qwen-32B [2] (47 points) using 50% training steps (Figure 1). We propose the Decoupled Clip and Dynamic sAmpling Policy Optimization (DAPO) algorithm, and introduce 4 key techniques to make RL shine in the long-CoT RL scenario. Details are presented in Section 3.
items.zh: 为了弥补这一差距，我们发布了一个开源的最先进大规模大语言模型强化学习系统，该系统基于Qwen2.5-32B模型在AIME 2024上达到50分，使用50%的训练步数超越了DeepSeek-R1-Zero-Qwen-32B [2]（47分）之前的最优结果（图1）。我们提出了解耦裁剪与动态采样策略优化（DAPO）算法，并介绍了使强化学习在长思维链强化学习场景中表现出色的四个关键技术。细节见第3节。

items.en: Clip-Higher, which promotes the diversity of the system and avoids entropy collapse;
items.zh: Clip-Higher：提高系统多样性并避免熵崩溃；

items.en: Dynamic Sampling, which improves training efficiency and stability;
items.zh: 动态采样：提高训练效率和稳定性；

items.en: Token-Level Policy Gradient Loss, which is critical in long-CoT RL scenarios;
items.zh: 词元级策略梯度损失：在长思维链强化学习场景中至关重要；

items.en: Overlong Reward Shaping, which reduces reward noise and stabilizes training.
items.zh: 过长奖励塑形：减少奖励噪声并稳定训练。

items.en: Our implementation is based on verl [20]. By fully releasing our state-of-the-art RL system including training code and data, we aim to reveal valuable insights to large-scale LLM RL that benefit the larger community.
items.zh: 我们的实现基于verl [20]。通过完全发布我们最先进的强化学习系统，包括训练代码和数据，我们旨在揭示大规模大语言模型强化学习的宝贵见解，惠及更广泛的社区。

items.en: PPO [21] introduces a clipped surrogate objective for policy optimization. By constraining the policy updates within a proximal region of the previous policy using clip, PPO stabilizes training and improves sample efficiency. Specifically, PPO updates the policy by maximizing the following objective:
items.zh: PPO [21] 引入了裁剪替代目标用于策略优化。通过使用裁剪将策略更新限制在先前策略的近端区域内，PPO稳定了训练并提高了样本效率。具体来说，PPO通过最大化以下目标来更新策略：

items.en: where (q,a)(q,a) is a question-answer pair from the data distribution 𝒟\mathcal{D}, ε\varepsilon is the clipping range of importance sampling ratio, and A^t\hat{A}_{t} is an estimator of the advantage at time step tt. Given the value function VV and the reward function RR, A^t\hat{A}_{t} is computed using the Generalized Advantage Estimation (GAE) [22]:
items.zh: 其中 (q,a)(q,a) 是来自数据分布 𝒟\mathcal{D} 的问题-答案对，ε\varepsilon 是重要性采样比的裁剪范围，A^t\hat{A}_{t} 是时间步 tt 的优势估计器。给定价值函数 VV 和奖励函数 RR，A^t\hat{A}_{t} 使用广义优势估计（GAE）[22] 计算：

items.en: Compared to PPO, GRPO eliminates the value function and estimates the advantage in a group-relative manner. For a specific question-answer pair (q,a)(q,a), the behavior policy πθold\pi_{\theta_{\text{old}}} samples a group of GG individual responses {oi}i=1G\{o_{i}\}_{i=1}^{G}. Then, the advantage of the ii-th response is calculated by normalizing the group-level rewards {Ri}i=1G\{R_{i}\}_{i=1}^{G}:
items.zh: 与PPO相比，GRPO消除了价值函数，并以组相对方式估计优势。对于特定问题-答案对 (q,a)(q,a)，行为策略 πθold\pi_{\theta_{\text{old}}} 采样一组 GG 个独立响应 {oi}i=1G\{o_{i}\}_{i=1}^{G}。然后，第 ii 个响应的优势通过归一化组级奖励 {Ri}i=1G\{R_{i}\}_{i=1}^{G} 计算：

items.en: Similar to PPO, GRPO adopts a clipped objective, together with a directly imposed KL penalty term:
items.zh: 与PPO类似，GRPO采用裁剪目标，并直接施加KL惩罚项：

items.en: It is also worth noting that GRPO computes the objective at the sample-level. To be exact, GRPO first calculates the mean loss within each generated sequence, before averaging the loss of different samples. As we will be discussing in Section 3.3, such difference may have an impact on the performance of the algorithm.
items.zh: 还值得注意的是，GRPO在样本级别计算目标。确切地说，GRPO首先计算每个生成序列内的平均损失，然后对不同样本的损失进行平均。正如我们将在第3.3节讨论的，这种差异可能对算法的性能产生影响。

items.en: The KL penalty term is used to regulate the divergence between the online policy and the frozen reference policy. In the RLHF scenario [23], the goal of RL is to align the model behavior without diverging too far from the initial model. However, during training the long-CoT reasoning model, the model distribution can diverge significantly from the initial model, thus this restriction is not necessary. Therefore, we will exclude the KL term from our proposed algorithm.
items.zh: KL惩罚项用于调控在线策略与冻结参考策略之间的散度。在基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）场景[23]中，强化学习的目标是使模型行为对齐，同时避免与初始模型偏离过大。然而，在训练长思维链推理模型时，模型分布可能与初始模型显著偏离，因此这一限制并非必要。因此，我们将从所提出的算法中排除KL项。

items.en: The use of reward model usually suffers from the reward hacking problem [24, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29]. Instead, we directly use the final accuracy of a verifiable task as the outcome reward, computed using the following rule:
items.zh: 使用奖励模型通常会遭受奖励破解问题[24, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29]。相反，我们直接使用可验证任务的最终准确率作为结果奖励，通过以下规则计算：

items.en: where yy is the ground-truth answer and y^\hat{y} is the predicted answer. This is proved to be an effective approach to activating the base model’s reasoning capability, as shown in multiple domains such as automated theorem proving [30, 31, 32, 33], computer programming [34, 35, 36, 37], and mathematics competition [2].
items.zh: 其中 yy 是真实答案，y^\hat{y} 是预测答案。这已被证明是激活基础模型推理能力的有效方法，如在自动定理证明[30, 31, 32, 33]、计算机编程[34, 35, 36, 37]和数学竞赛[2]等多个领域所示。

items.en: We propose the Decouple Clip and Dynamic sAmpling Policy Optimization (DAPO) algorithm. DAPO samples a group of outputs {oi}i=1G\{o_{i}\}_{i=1}^{G} for each question qq paired with the answer aa, and optimizes the policy via the following objective:
items.zh: 我们提出了解耦裁剪与动态采样策略优化（DAPO）算法。DAPO为每个问题 qq 及其答案 aa 采样一组输出 {oi}i=1G\{o_{i}\}_{i=1}^{G}，并通过以下目标优化策略：

items.en: The full algorithm can be found in Algorithm 1. In this section, we will introduce the key techniques associated with DAPO.
items.zh: 完整算法见算法1。本节将介绍与DAPO相关的关键技术。

items.en: In our initial experiments using naive PPO [21] or GRPO [38], we observed the entropy collapse phenomenon: the entropy of the policy decreases quickly as training progresses (Figure˜2(b)). The sampled responses of certain groups tend to be nearly identical. This indicates limited exploration and early deterministic policy, which can hinder the scaling process.
items.zh: 在使用朴素PPO[21]或GRPO[38]的初步实验中，我们观察到熵崩溃现象：随着训练进行，策略的熵迅速下降（图2(b)）。某些组的采样响应趋于几乎相同。这表明探索有限且策略过早确定性，这可能阻碍缩放过程。

items.en: We propose the Clip-Higher strategy to address this issue. Clipping over the importance sampling ratio is introduced in Clipped Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO-Clip) [21] to restrict the trust region and enhance the stability of RL. We identify that the upper clip can restrict the exploration of the policy. In this case, it is much easier to make an ‘exploitation token’ more probable, than to uplift the probability of an unlikely ‘exploration token’.
items.zh: 我们提出Clip-Higher策略来解决此问题。裁剪重要性采样比率在裁剪近端策略优化（PPO-Clip）[21]中被引入，以限制信任区域并增强强化学习的稳定性。我们发现上界裁剪会限制策略的探索。在这种情况下，使“利用词元”更可能比提升一个不太可能的“探索词元”的概率要容易得多。

items.en: Concretely, when ε=0.2\varepsilon=0.2 (the default value of most algorithms), consider two actions with probabilities πθold​(oi∣q)=0.01\pi_{\theta_{\text{old}}}(o_{i}\mid q)=0.01 and 0.90.9. The maximum possible updated probabilities πθ​(oi∣q)\pi_{\theta}(o_{i}\mid q) are 0.0120.012 and 1.081.08, respectively. This implies that for tokens with a higher probability (e.g., 0.9) is less constrained. Conversely, for low-probability tokens, achieving a non-trivial increase in probability is considerably more challenging. Empirically, we also observe that the maximum probability of clipped tokens is approximately πθ​(oi∣q)<0.2\pi_{\theta}(o_{i}\mid q)<0.2 (Figure˜3(a)). This finding supports our analysis that the upper clipping threshold indeed restricts the probability increase of low-probability tokens, thereby potentially constraining the diversity of the system.
items.zh: 具体来说，当 ε=0.2\varepsilon=0.2（大多数算法的默认值）时，考虑两个动作的概率分别为 πθold​(oi∣q)=0.01\pi_{\theta_{\text{old}}}(o_{i}\mid q)=0.01 和 0.90.9。更新后的最大可能概率 πθ​(oi∣q)\pi_{\theta}(o_{i}\mid q) 分别为 0.0120.012 和 1.081.08。这意味着对于概率较高的词元（例如0.9），约束较少。相反，对于低概率词元，实现概率的非平凡增加要困难得多。经验上，我们还观察到裁剪词元的最大概率约为 πθ​(oi∣q)<0.2\pi_{\theta}(o_{i}\mid q)<0.2（图3(a)）。这一发现支持了我们的分析，即上界裁剪阈值确实限制了低概率词元的概率增加，从而可能约束系统的多样性。

items.en: Adhering to the Clip-Higher strategy, we decouple the lower and higher clipping range as εlow\varepsilon_{\text{low}} and εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}}, as highlighted in Equation 10:
items.zh: 遵循Clip-Higher策略，我们将下界和上界裁剪范围解耦为 εlow\varepsilon_{\text{low}} 和 εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}}，如公式10所示：

items.en: We increase the value of εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}} to leave more room for the increase of low-probability tokens. As shown in Figure˜2, this adjustment effectively enhances the policy’s entropy and facilitates the generation of more diverse samples. We opt to keep εlow\varepsilon_{\text{low}} relatively small, because increasing it will suppress the probability of these tokens to 0, resulting in the collapse of the sampling space.
items.zh: 我们增加 εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}} 的值，为低概率词元的增加留出更多空间。如图2所示，这一调整有效提升了策略的熵，并促进了更多样化样本的生成。我们选择保持 εlow\varepsilon_{\text{low}} 相对较小，因为增加它会使这些词元的概率抑制到0，导致采样空间崩溃。

items.capEn: (b) The proportion of samples with an accuracy of 1.

full.sec: 3.2 The More the Merrier: Dynamic Sampling

items.en: Existing RL algorithm suffers from the gradient-decreasing problem when some prompts have accuracy equal to 1. For example for GRPO, if all outputs {oi}i=1G\{o_{i}\}_{i=1}^{G} of a particular prompt are correct and receive the same reward 1, the resulting advantage for this group is zero. A zero advantage results in no gradients for policy updates, thereby reducing sample efficiency. Empirically, the number of samples with accuracy equal to 1 continues to increase, as shown in Figure˜3(b). This means that the effective number of prompts in each batch keeps decreasing, which can lead to larger variance in gradient and dampens the gradient signals for model training.
items.zh: 现有的强化学习算法在部分提示的准确率为1时会遭受梯度递减问题。例如对于GRPO，如果某个特定提示的所有输出 {oi}i=1G\{o_{i}\}_{i=1}^{G} 都正确且获得相同奖励1，则该组的优势为零。零优势导致策略更新无梯度，从而降低样本效率。经验上，准确率为1的样本数量持续增加，如图3(b)所示。这意味着每批次中有效提示的数量不断减少，可能导致梯度方差增大并削弱模型训练的梯度信号。

items.en: To this end, we propose to over-sample and filter out prompts with the accuracy equal to 1 and 0 illustrated in Equation 11, leaving all prompts in the batch with effective gradients and keeping a consistent number of prompts. Before training, we keep sampling until the batch is fully filled with samples whose accuracy is neither 0 nor 1.
items.zh: 为此，我们提出过采样并过滤掉准确率为1和0的提示，如公式11所示，使批次中的所有提示都具有有效梯度并保持一致的提示数量。在训练前，我们持续采样直到批次完全由准确率既不为0也不为1的样本填充。

items.en: Note that this strategy does not necessarily impede training efficiency, because the generation time is typically dominated by the generation of long-tail samples if the RL system is synchronized and the generation stage is not pipelined. Besides, we find that with dynamic sampling the experiment achieves the same performance faster as shown in Figure˜6.
items.zh: 注意，此策略不一定阻碍训练效率，因为如果强化学习系统是同步的且生成阶段未流水线化，生成时间通常由长尾样本的生成主导。此外，我们发现使用动态采样时，实验达到相同性能的速度更快，如图6所示。

full.sec: 3.3 Rebalancing Act: Token-Level Policy Gradient Loss
full.secZh: 3.3 再平衡：Token级策略梯度损失

items.en: The original GRPO algorithm employs a sample-level loss calculation, which involves first averaging the losses by token within each sample and then aggregating the losses across samples. In this approach, each sample is assigned an equal weight in the final loss computation. However, we find that this method of loss reduction introduces several challenges in the context of long-CoT RL scenarios.
items.zh: 原始的GRPO算法采用样本级损失计算，即先对每个样本内的词元损失取平均，再跨样本聚合损失。在这种方法中，每个样本在最终损失计算中被赋予相同权重。然而，我们发现这种损失归约方法在长思维链强化学习场景中引入了若干挑战。

items.en: Since all samples are assigned the same weight in the loss calculation, tokens within longer responses (which contain more tokens) may have a disproportionately lower contribution to the overall loss, which can lead to two adverse effects. First, for high-quality long samples, this effect can impede the model’s ability to learn reasoning-relevant patterns within them. Second, we observe that excessively long samples often exhibit low-quality patterns such as gibberish and repetitive words. Thus, sample-level loss calculation, due to its inability to effectively penalize those undesirable patterns in long samples, leads to an unhealthy increase in entropy and response length, as shown in Figure˜4(a) and Figure˜4(b).
items.zh: 由于所有样本在损失计算中被赋予相同权重，较长响应（包含更多词元）中的词元可能对总损失的贡献不成比例地低，这可能导致两个不利影响。首先，对于高质量的长样本，这种效应可能阻碍模型学习其中与推理相关的模式。其次，我们观察到过长的样本通常表现出低质量模式，如胡言乱语和重复词语。因此，样本级损失计算由于无法有效惩罚长样本中的这些不良模式，导致熵和响应长度不健康地增加，如图4(a)和图4(b)所示。

items.capEn: (a) Entropy of actor model’s generation probabilities.
items.capZh: (a) 演员模型生成概率的熵。

items.capEn: (b) Average length of actor model-generated responses
items.capZh: (b) 演员模型生成响应的平均长度。

items.en: We introduce a Token-level Policy Gradient Loss in the long-CoT RL scenario to address the above limitations:
items.zh: 我们在长思维链强化学习场景中引入词元级策略梯度损失以解决上述限制：

items.en: In this setting, longer sequences can have more influence on the overall gradient update compared to shorter sequences. Moreover, from the perspective of individual tokens, if a particular generation pattern can lead to an increase or decrease in reward, it will be equally prompted or suppressed, regardless of the length of the response in which it appears.
items.zh: 在这种设置下，较长的序列相比短序列可能对整体梯度更新产生更大影响。此外，从单个词元的角度来看，如果某个生成模式能导致奖励增加或减少，无论它出现在多长的响应中，都会被同等程度地促进或抑制。

full.sec: 3.4 Hide and Seek: Overlong Reward Shaping

items.en: In RL training, we typically set a maximum length for generation, with overlong samples truncated accordingly. We find that improper reward shaping for truncated samples can introduce reward noise and significantly disrupt the training process.
items.zh: 在强化学习训练中，我们通常设置最大生成长度，超长的样本会被相应截断。我们发现，对截断样本不恰当的奖励塑造会引入奖励噪声，并显著干扰训练过程。

items.en: By default, we assign a punitive reward to truncated samples. This approach may introduce noise into the training process, as a sound reasoning process can be penalized solely due to its excessive length. Such penalties can potentially confuse the model regarding the validity of its reasoning process.
items.zh: 默认情况下，我们对截断样本分配惩罚性奖励。这种方法可能会向训练过程引入噪声，因为一个合理的推理过程可能仅仅因为过长而受到惩罚。这种惩罚可能使模型对其推理过程的有效性产生困惑。

items.en: To investigate the impact of this reward noise, we first apply an Overlong Filtering strategy which masks the loss of truncated samples. We find that this approach significantly stabilizes training and enhances performance, as demonstrated in Figure˜5.
items.zh: 为了研究这种奖励噪声的影响，我们首先应用了一种超长过滤策略，该策略会屏蔽截断样本的损失。我们发现，这种方法显著稳定了训练并提升了性能，如图5所示。

items.en: Furthermore, we propose Soft Overlong Punishment (Equation 13), a length-aware penalty mechanism designed to shape the reward for truncated samples. Specifically, when the response length exceeds the predefined maximum value, we define a punishment interval. Within this interval, the longer the response, the greater the punishment it receives. This penalty is added to the original rule-based correctness reward, thereby signaling to the model to avoid excessively long responses.
items.zh: (c) 生成熵。

items.en: Our dataset is sourced from the AoPS222https://artofproblemsolving.com/ website and official competition homepages through a combination of web scraping and manual annotation. The answers of math dataset typically come in a variety of formats, such as expression, formula and number, which makes it challenging to design comprehensive rules to parse them. To provide accurate reward signals using rules and minimize errors introduced by formula parsers, inspired by AIME, we select and transform the answers into integers, which are easy to parse. For example, if the original answer is expressed in the form of a+bc\frac{a+\sqrt{b}}{c}, we instruct the LLM to modify the question so that the expected answer becomes a+b+ca+b+c. After selection and transformation, we obtained the DAPO-Math-17K dataset, which consists of 17K prompts, each paired with an integer as the answer.
items.zh: (d) 平均概率。

items.en: In this work, we focus specifically on mathematical tasks to evaluate our algorithm, which can be readily transferred to other tasks. We adopt the verl framework [20] for training. We use naive GRPO [38] as our baseline algorithm and estimate advantages using group reward normalization.
items.zh: 此外，我们提出了软超长惩罚（公式13），这是一种长度感知的惩罚机制，旨在为截断样本塑造奖励。具体来说，当响应长度超过预定义的最大值时，我们定义一个惩罚区间。在此区间内，响应越长，受到的惩罚越大。该惩罚被添加到基于规则的正确性奖励之上，从而向模型发出信号，避免生成过长的响应。

items.en: For hyper-parameters, we utilize the AdamW [39] optimizer with a constant learning rate of 1×10−61\times 10^{-6}, incorporating a linear warm-up over 20 rollout steps. For rollout, the prompt batch size is 512 and we sample 16 responses for each prompt. For training, the mini-batch size is set to 512, i.e., 16 gradient updates for each rollout step. For Overlong Reward Shaping, we set the expected maximum length as 16,384 tokens and allocate additional 4,096 tokens as the soft punish cache. Therefore, the maximum number of tokens for generation is set to 20,480 tokens. As for the Clip-Higher mechanism, we set the clipping parameter εlow\varepsilon_{\text{low}} to 0.2 and εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}} to 0.28, which effectively balance the trade-off between exploration and exploitation. For evaluation on AIME, we repeat the evaluation set for 32 times and report avg@32 for results stability. The inference hyperparameters of evaluation are set to temperature 1.0 and topp 0.7.
items.zh: 我们的数据集来源于AoPS网站和官方竞赛主页，通过网页抓取和人工标注相结合的方式获取。数学数据集的答案通常有多种格式，如表达式、公式和数字，这使得设计全面的解析规则变得困难。为了使用规则提供准确的奖励信号并减少公式解析器引入的错误，受AIME启发，我们选择并将答案转换为易于解析的整数。例如，如果原始答案以(a+√b)/c的形式表示，我们指示大语言模型修改问题，使预期答案变为a+b+c。经过选择和转换，我们获得了DAPO-Math-17K数据集，包含17K个提示，每个提示对应一个整数答案。

items.capEn: Figure 6: The training progress before and after applying dynamic sampling on a baseline setting.
items.capZh: 在这项工作中，我们专注于数学任务来评估我们的算法，该算法可以轻松迁移到其他任务。我们采用verl框架进行训练。我们使用朴素GRPO作为基线算法，并通过组奖励归一化来估计优势。

items.en: Experiments on AIME 2024 demonstrate that DAPO has successfully trained the Qwen-32B Base model into a powerful reasoning model, achieving performance superior to DeepSeek’s experiments on Qwen2.5-32B using the R1 approach. In Figure 1, we observe a substantial improvement of performance on AIME 2024, with accuracy increasing from near 0% to 50%. Notably, this improvement is achieved with only 50% of the training steps required by DeepSeek-R1-Zero-Qwen-32B.
items.zh: 对于超参数，我们使用AdamW优化器，学习率恒定为1×10^{-6}，并在20个rollout步骤中进行线性预热。对于rollout，提示批次大小为512，每个提示采样16个响应。对于训练，小批量大小设置为512，即每个rollout步骤进行16次梯度更新。对于超长奖励塑造，我们将期望最大长度设置为16,384个词元，并额外分配4,096个词元作为软惩罚缓存。因此，生成的最大词元数设置为20,480个词元。至于Clip-Higher机制，我们将裁剪参数ε_low设置为0.2，ε_high设置为0.28，这有效平衡了探索与利用之间的权衡。对于AIME上的评估，我们将评估集重复32次，并报告avg@32以确保结果稳定性。评估的推理超参数设置为温度1.0和top-p 0.7。

items.en: We analyze the contributions of each training technique in our methodology, as detailed in Table˜1. The observed improvements demonstrate the effectiveness of these techniques in RL training, each contributing several accuracy points in AIME 2024. Notably, given the vanilla GRPO setting, only 30% accuracy can be reached by training from a Qwen2.5-32B base model.
items.zh: 图6：在基线设置下应用动态采样前后的训练进度。

items.en: For token-level loss, although it brings less performance improvement, we find it enhances training stability and makes the length increase more healthily.
items.zh: 在AIME 2024上的实验表明，DAPO已成功将Qwen-32B基础模型训练成一个强大的推理模型，其性能优于DeepSeek在Qwen2.5-32B上使用R1方法的实验。在图1中，我们观察到AIME 2024上的性能大幅提升，准确率从接近0%提高到50%。值得注意的是，这一提升仅用了DeepSeek-R1-Zero-Qwen-32B所需训练步骤的50%。

items.en: When applying Dynamic Sampling, although more data needs to be sampled due to the filtering out of zero-gradient data, the overall training time is not significantly affected. As shown in Figure˜6, although the number of sampling instances increases, the model’s convergence time is even reduced, due to fewer training steps required.
items.zh: 我们分析了每种训练技术在我们方法中的贡献，详见表1。观察到的改进证明了这些技术在强化学习训练中的有效性，每种技术在AIME 2024上都贡献了几个准确率百分点。值得注意的是，在朴素GRPO设置下，从Qwen2.5-32B基础模型训练只能达到30%的准确率。

items.en: Reinforcement learning on large language models is not only a cutting-edge research direction but also an intrinsically complex systems engineering challenge, characterized by the interdependence of its various subsystems. Modifications to any single subsystem can propagate through the system, leading to unforeseen consequences due to the intricate interplay among these components. Even seemingly minor changes in initial conditions, such as variations in data and hyperparameters, can amplify through iterative reinforcement learning processes, yielding substantial deviations in outcomes. This complexity often confronts researchers with a dilemma: even after meticulous analysis and well-founded expectations that a modification will enhance specific aspects of the training process, the actual results frequently diverge from the anticipated trajectory. Therefore, monitoring of key intermediate results during experimentation is essential for swiftly identifying the sources of discrepancies and, ultimately, for refining the system.
items.zh: 对于词元级损失，尽管它带来的性能提升较小，但我们发现它增强了训练稳定性，并使长度增长更健康。

items.capZh: 当应用动态采样时，尽管由于过滤掉零梯度数据而需要采样更多数据，但整体训练时间并未受到显著影响。如图6所示，尽管采样实例数量增加，但模型的收敛时间甚至减少了，因为所需的训练步骤更少。

大型语言模型上的强化学习不仅是一个前沿研究方向，也是一个本质上复杂的系统工程挑战，其特点是各个子系统相互依赖。对任何单个子系统的修改都可能通过系统传播，由于这些组件之间复杂的相互作用，导致不可预见的后果。即使是初始条件中看似微小的变化，例如数据和超参数的变化，也可能通过迭代强化学习过程放大，导致结果的巨大偏差。这种复杂性常常使研究人员面临两难境地：即使经过细致分析和合理预期认为修改会增强训练过程的特定方面，实际结果也常常偏离预期轨迹。因此，在实验过程中监控关键中间结果对于快速识别差异来源并最终完善系统至关重要。

items.en: The Length of Generated Responses is a metric closely related to training stability and performance, as shown in Figure˜7(a). The increase in length provides the model with a larger space for exploration, allowing more complex reasoning behaviors to be sampled and gradually reinforced through training. However, it is important to note that length does not always maintain a continuous upward trend during training. In some considerable periods, it can exhibit a trend of stagnation or even decline, which has also been demonstrated in [2]. We typically use length in conjunction with validation accuracy as indicators to assess whether an experiment is deteriorating.
items.zh: 生成响应的长度是一个与训练稳定性和性能密切相关的指标，如图7(a)所示。长度的增加为模型提供了更大的探索空间，使得更复杂的推理行为能够被采样并通过训练逐步强化。然而，需要注意的是，长度在训练过程中并不总是保持持续上升趋势。在某些相当长的时期内，它可能表现出停滞甚至下降的趋势，这一点在[2]中也得到了证明。我们通常将长度与验证准确率结合使用，作为评估实验是否恶化的指标。

items.en: The Dynamics of Reward during training has always been one of the crucial monitoring indicators in reinforcement learning, as shown in Figure˜7(b). In the majority of our experiments, the trend of reward increase is relatively stable and does not fluctuate or decline significantly due to adjustments in experimental settings. This indicates that, given a reliable reward signal, language models can robustly fit the distribution of training set. However, we find that the final reward on the training set often exhibits little correlation with the accuracy on the validation set, which indicates overfitting to the training set.
items.zh: 训练过程中的奖励动态一直是强化学习中关键的监控指标之一，如图7(b)所示。在我们的大多数实验中，奖励增长的趋势相对稳定，不会因实验设置的调整而出现显著波动或下降。这表明，在可靠的奖励信号下，语言模型能够稳健地拟合训练集分布。然而，我们发现训练集上的最终奖励通常与验证集上的准确率相关性很小，这表明模型对训练集存在过拟合。

items.en: The Entropy of the Actor Model and Generation Probability are related to the model’s exploration capability and are key metrics that we closely monitor in our experiments. Intuitively, the model’s entropy needs to be maintained within an appropriate range. An excessively low entropy indicates that the probability distribution is overly sharp, leading to a loss of exploration capability. Conversely, an excessively high entropy is often associated with issues of over-exploration such as gibberish and repetitive generation. For the generation probability, the situation is exactly the opposite. As demonstrated in Section˜3.1, by applying the Clip-Higher strategy, we effectively addressed the issue of entropy collapse. In subsequent experiments, we find that maintaining a slow upward trend in entropy is conducive to the improvement of model performance, shown in Figure˜7(c) and Figure˜7(d).
items.zh: 演员模型的熵和生成概率与模型的探索能力相关，是我们在实验中密切监控的关键指标。直观上，模型的熵需要保持在适当范围内。熵过低表明概率分布过于尖锐，导致探索能力丧失；反之，熵过高通常与过度探索问题相关，如胡言乱语和重复生成。对于生成概率，情况则完全相反。如第3.1节所示，通过应用Clip-Higher策略，我们有效解决了熵崩溃问题。在后续实验中，我们发现保持熵的缓慢上升趋势有利于模型性能的提升，如图7(c)和图7(d)所示。

items.en: During the RL training process, we observe an interesting phenomenon: the reasoning patterns of the actor model evolve dynamically over time. Specifically, the algorithm not only reinforces existing reasoning patterns that facilitate correct problem-solving but also gradually gives rise to entirely new modes of reasoning that were initially absent. This finding reveals the adaptability and exploration capability of RL algorithms and offers new insights into the learning mechanisms of the model.
items.zh: 在强化学习训练过程中，我们观察到一个有趣的现象：演员模型的推理模式随时间动态演化。具体来说，算法不仅强化了有助于正确解决问题的现有推理模式，还逐渐产生了最初不存在的新推理模式。这一发现揭示了强化学习算法的适应性和探索能力，并为模型的学习机制提供了新的见解。

items.en: For example, in the early stages of model training, there was virtually no occurrence of checking and reflecting on previous reasoning steps. However, as training progresses, the model exhibits distinct behaviors of reflection and backtracking, as shown in Table˜2. This observation sheds light on further exploration into interpreting the emergence of reasoning abilities during RL, which we leave for future research.
items.zh: 例如，在模型训练的早期阶段，几乎不存在对先前推理步骤的检查和反思。然而，随着训练的进行，模型表现出明显的反思和回溯行为，如表2所示。这一观察为进一步探索强化学习过程中推理能力的涌现提供了启示，我们将其留作未来研究。

items.en: In this paper, we release a fully open-sourced system for large-scale LLM RL, including algorithm, code infrastructure, and dataset. The system achieves state-of-the-art large-scale LLM RL performance (AIME 50 using Qwen-32B pretrained model). We propose the Decoupled Clip and Dynamic sAmpling Policy Optimization (DAPO) algorithm, and introduce 4 key techniques to make RL powerfully effective and efficient in the long-CoT RL scenario. Additionally, by open-sourcing the training code and dataset, we provide the broader research community and society with practical access to a scalable reinforcement learning solution, enabling all to benefit from these advancements.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们发布了一个完全开源的大规模LLM强化学习系统，包括算法、代码基础设施和数据集。该系统实现了最先进的大规模LLM强化学习性能（使用Qwen-32B预训练模型在AIME上达到50分）。我们提出了解耦裁剪与动态采样策略优化（DAPO）算法，并引入了4项关键技术，使强化学习在长思维链强化学习场景中高效且有效。此外，通过开源训练代码和数据集，我们为更广泛的研究社区和社会提供了可扩展的强化学习解决方案的实际访问途径，使所有人能够从这些进步中受益。

items.en: Qiying Yu1,2,4, Zheng Zhang1, Ruofei Zhu1, Yufeng Yuan1, Xiaochen Zuo1, Yu Yue1

items.zh: Tiantian Fan1, Gaohong Liu1, Lingjun Liu1, Xin Liu1, Haibin Lin1, Zhiqi Lin1, Bole Ma1, Guangming Sheng1,3, Yuxuan Tong1,2,4, Qiying Yu1,2,4, Chi Zhang1, Mofan Zhang1, Wang Zhang1, Hang Zhu1, Jinhua Zhu1

items.zh: Jiaze Chen1, Jiangjie Chen1,4, Chengyi Wang1, Hongli Yu1,2,4, Weinan Dai1,2,4, Yuxuan Song1,2,4, Xiangpeng Wei1, Qiying Yu1,2,4

items.zh: 2清华大学智能产业研究院（AIR）

items.en: We thank Zhengyin Du, Kai Shen, Tianyang Zhan, Zhen Xiao, Renjie Zheng, Li Han, Kaihua Jiang as well as other colleagues at ByteDance for their support for the DAPO project.
items.zh: 我们感谢字节跳动的Zhengyin Du、Kai Shen、Tianyang Zhan、Zhen Xiao、Renjie Zheng、Li Han、Kaihua Jiang以及其他同事对DAPO项目的支持。
